step3_pre_screen_discrepancy.note: None of the prior B67 / B8-12 sessions had tested (-4, 0, 0, +/-12, +/-6) with deep validation. The B8-12 memory note 'Targeted check (-4,0,0,+/-12,+/-6) recommended' is now executed and confirms a new Log family. No discrepancy with prior data.

step1_pcf_label_correction.note: Initial KNOWN_FAMILIES list incorrectly labelled (-1,0,0,6,-3) and (-1,0,0,-6,3) as Log families with L = +/- 2/log(2). Numerical check shows L approx +/- 3.397, NOT a clean Log identity (PSLQ found no relation). The actual 2 Log families are (+6,+3) and (-6,-3) sign-paired only. This refines (does not contradict) the B67 memory entry.
